Title: My Sold Listings - Ayana Morton

URL Source: https://ayanarealestate.com/listings/my-sold-listings

Published Time: Tue, 14 Apr 2026 06:06:19 GMT

Markdown Content:
# My Sold Listings - Ayana Morton

[![Image 2: Brokerage logo](https://images.cloud.realogyprod.com/companies/CBR/P00500000FDdqQEMiwvZiilpsc6Ag72YGnLFeWFB/logos/P01600000Gle36XrZbb5FVquJ9SLubLzzJwzFB8I.jpg?width=500)![Image 4: Brokerage logo](https://images.cloud.realogyprod.com/companies/CBR/P00500000FDdqQEMiwvZiilpsc6Ag72YGnLFeWFB/logos/P01600000Gle36XrZbb5FVquJ9SLubLzzJwzFB8I.jpg?width=500)![Image 6: Brokerage logo](https://images.cloud.realogyprod.com/companies/CBR/P00500000FDdqQEMiwvZiilpsc6Ag72YGnLFeWFB/logos/P01600000Gle3Dp1vMoWIYUOC7ryE4KwNeXDe8mR.jpg?width=500)![Image 8: Brokerage logo](https://images.cloud.realogyprod.com/companies/CBR/P00500000FDdqQEMiwvZiilpsc6Ag72YGnLFeWFB/logos/P01600000Gle3Dp1vMoWIYUOC7ryE4KwNeXDe8mR.jpg?width=500)](https://ayanarealestate.com/)

 $747,000 (USD)

## Bear Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 15 Waterton Drive Bear, DE 19701

7 Bed 

5 Baths 

4220 sqft

 Back on Market, Buyers unable to obtain financing. WoW Show asap. Home is now empty and ready for a quick close. STUNNING Toll Brothers Home located in Prestigious Red Lion Chase. Don't miss this opportunity to tour this 6 Bed room & office plus 4 1/2 Bath home ! Open floorplan with room to spread out and host gatherings and parties. Full Finished Basement and Lush Backyard with amazing tiered decks, overlooking woods and Dragon creek. 3 Car attached Turned garage and Large 1/2 acre lot! Stucco issues already corrected, documents in disclosures. Conveniently located next to RT-1/RT-13 with easy access to I-95, Christiana Mall, Delaware beaches, major financial and tech hubs in Newark and Wilmington and within easy reach of Maryland, this amenity rich community of Red Lion Chase features a community pool, clubhouse, gym, tennis and basketball courts, miles of walking/jogging trails and a playground area. This stunning home exudes stately curb appeal. The backyard is an oasis that has privacy and backs to the woodline. The maintenance free, expanded multi-level deck is the most amazing spot to enjoy outdoor entertaining and dining. The interior of the home has WOW factor! The front entry foyer ceilings soar with double height, and massive Chandier (that is motorized for easy maintence) the curved staircase and open balcony above are magnificent. This home is loaded with upgrades and trim packages, elevating it to the next level. The fully finished basement adds to the overall square footage and is wonderful for entertaining indoors or use the walk out doors to give you direct access to the wonderful private yard. This home is the GEM of Red Lion Chase. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Golden Coastal Realty 

 $630,000 (USD)

## Middletown Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 312 Jessica Drive Middletown, DE 19709

4 Bed 

4 Baths 

4550 sqft

 The pictures say it all Summer living to the finest. Just south of the canal off 896, WHY drive more to get less. Great Appo schools and spacious in a friendly community of quality homes. This home is around 3000 square ft above grade, and has huge family room in the basement thats about 700 square feet finished space with a powderroom. The centerhall home has formal living room and dining in the front of the home with the kichen breakfast area and family room accross the rear. Off the family room is a builder added sun room with vaulted ceiling . Two way fireplace between the family room and sun room. Office-study off the kitchen with walk in pantry and a separate laundry room. Glass doors to the deck is off the breakfast area and over looks the great ingound pool . Wonderful neutral condition, cherry kitchen cabinets nice laminate flooring, granite counters and much more. The 4 large bedrooms were created not having and open 2sty foyer. Owners ste has a beautiful bath with new floor, over sized sink, big walk in closets. The other bedrooms are great sized and all with neutral carpet. Basement finished area is huge and includes the pool table . Pleanty of storage in the unfinished area of the basement with crawl space accessable storage as well. Outside the large lot offers plently of room away from the pool area and has a nice shed for all the pool equipments and yard care tool storage. Solar panels keep the utilites bill very low. The SOLAR PANELS are owned and will be conveyed with the home. Seller per Delmarva saves $117 per month and the electric cost per month for electric is $42. In addition the Seller has signed up the State of Delaware Renewal energy, Srecreation progam and get on average $50 per month based on electric generated. FINALLY a solar panel benifit thats e-z to uderstand. NO LEASE. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX 

 $570,000 (USD)

## Hockessin Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 1 E Aldine Dr Hockessin, DE 19707

4 Bed 

4 Baths 

2500 sqft

 🏡 Charming 4-Bedroom Home on a Corner Lot in Hockessin, DE!Don’t miss this fantastic opportunity to own a well-maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom home in an established Hockessin community! Situated on a desirable corner lot, this home offers space, convenience, and great curb appeal.Step outside to enjoy the recently painted deck with an electric awning—perfect for relaxing or entertaining in the shade. Inside, you'll find a spacious layout featuring a large pantry, a generous laundry room, and a finished basement that is ideal for additional living space, a home office, recreation room, or guest suite. Recent updates include a new sump pump, ensuring peace of mind for the next homeowner.This home is being sold as is and is attractively priced to move quickly. Don't let this opportunity slip away—your dream home awaits! 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Coldwell Banker Realty / Ayana Morton 

 $515,000 (USD)

## Hockessin Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 200 Pond Drive Hockessin, DE 19707

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

2250 sqft

 Welcome to 200 Pond Drive! Affordability in Hockessin! Cul de sac location! This spacious split level home offers plenty of space for all your needs. Enter through the front door into the foyer, that leads directly to a gathering room with LVP floors, a gas fireplace, built in bar and sliders that open to a patio. There is also a powder room located on the first floor. On the upper level you will find the updated kitchen with newer appliances, double oven, granite counter tops, tons of cabinets, a large pantry and a window sitting area. French doors open to a large deck. Living Room is adjacent to the kitchen for an open living feel. Kitchen and Living room have hardwood floors. The primary bedroom offers a large walk in closet with tons of custom storage. It is also severed by an updated main bathroom. An additional updated bath serves the other 2 bedrooms on this floor. The lower level offers a large finished room that could be used as an office, playroom or gathering room. There is also a separate room that could have many uses and/or possibly a 4th bedroom. The backyard is partially fenced with views of the fountain and pond. Very convenient location in Hockessin. Close to shopping and restaurants. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Beiler-Campbell Realtors-Avondale 

 $490,000 (USD)

## Middletown Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 707 Kalmar Lane Middletown, DE 19709

3 Bed 

4 Baths 

2350 sqft

 SENSATIONAL 2 & BETTER Than NEW! This marvelous and rarely available 2 year old Schubert model Twin Home offers more than a new one could! This peach of a home is packed with helpful & lovely upgrades, making it an amazing choice! A large deck, an upgraded speckled garage floor, a Rain Bird irrigation system, sublime new flooring in the dining room, and fancy movable up/down blinds are all already there for you to enjoy! The Schubert model is of formidable size, boasting 2350 square feet on 3 levels and has a sought after 2 car garage with a lengthy and wide driveway! Curb appeal is not lacking with a sweetly landscaped front yard and an adorable front porch! The entry level showcases a large living room, a coat closet, the mechanical room w a tankless water heater, and a full bathroom fitted out with walls and the rough ins ready to be completed! Have a blast designing this third full bathroom on the first level! The second level is a modern marvel! The kitchen is a dazzling delight having a massive center island, bright white cabinetry, shiny white speckled quartz countertops, a vented stove, a deep bowl sink, lots of pull out drawers, and stainless appliances! Spacious Dining and Living Rooms beautifully adjoin the kitchen, creating such an open and airy second level! A useful walk in pantry, a powder room and a large deck complete this level. The third level is also a smash! The wonderfully designed primary suite has it all- a substantial walk in closet, a roomy bedroom, a soaking tub with a tiled surround (perfect for a book or glass of wine!), a separate shower with a seat, a dual vanity and the laundry room sits just outside the door, nicely secluding the suite! A hall bath, two other ample bedrooms with generous closet space and a linen closet complete the third level! This home is wonderfully located within the community as well as it backs to a small field with some growing trees instead of backing to another home! Six Car Parking between the 2 Car Garage and the driveway is a Major Perk!! Located just far enough from the hustle and bustle of in town, this Twin is close to shopping, major roads, and the necessities, yet offers a sweet rural feel as well! Make this Rarely Available Sensation yours today! 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Patterson-Schwartz Greenville 

 $480,000 (USD)

## Dover Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 61 Acorn Lane Dover, DE 19901

3 Bed 

2 Baths 

2215 sqft

 Major Price Improvement!Welcome to 61 Acorn Lane, a charming and spacious residence nestled in the heart of Dover, DE. This beautifully maintained home offers the perfect combination of comfort, style, and versatility. Recently updated with new flooring and solid oak doors, the property features a bright and airy sunroom and a versatile rec room, providing ample space for relaxation and entertainment.With 3 bedrooms and 1.5 bath, this home boasts unique amenities, including an outdoor shower and sink and an extra-large garage perfect for a mechanic’s workshop, a personal retreat, or even a play space for kids. The backyard is an outdoor oasis, complete with a **12x18 fenced kennel, a swimming pool, and a beautiful pergola, making it ideal for gatherings or tranquil evenings under the stars.A standout feature of this property is the separate building, formerly a licensed beauty shop. Fully equipped with two sinks, a refrigerator, cabinets, a bedroom, and a full bath, this space offers endless possibilities. With the addition of a stove, it could easily transform into an in-law suite or a private apartment for an older child. The property’s beauty shop license is transferrable, or the new owner can use the space for a variety of other businesses based on their needs. Please do not bother Dog in Kennel.Outside, the private, fenced backyard is perfect for outdoor activities, gardening, or simply enjoying the peace and quiet. Situated in a quiet, friendly neighborhood, this home is just minutes from local schools, shopping, dining, and Dover's top attractions.With easy access to major highways, commuting is convenient, whether you're heading to work or exploring the best Delaware has to offer. Don’t miss the opportunity to make 61 Acorn Lane your new home!Bonus: The beauty salon equipment, products, and business are available for purchase. The property’s beauty shop license is transferrable, or the new owner can use the space for a variety of other businesses based on their needs. If the new owner would like to run a different business not listed in the attached forms, they would need to apply for a Home Occupation approval with our office Kent County Levy Court. (See Attached) 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Coldwell Banker Realty / Ayana Morton 

 $464,990 (USD)

## Magnolia Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 113 Carriage Boulevard Magnolia, DE 19962

4 Bed 

3 Baths 

2804 sqft

 Discover 113 Carriage Drive, a new home with a basement in the Magnolia Estates community in Magnolia, DE. The Hanover, a contemporary 2,804 square feet two-story home, features four bedrooms, two and a half bathrooms, a flex room, a home office and a two-car garage.As you step into the distinct foyer you will appreciate the office with French doors that provides the perfect space for a home office or a private den. The flex room is versatile and could be used for a formal dining room or a playroom.The spacious kitchen boasts an abundance of white cabinetry and granite counter space, an expansive walk-in pantry, a large island with room for seating and stainless-steel appliances. The kitchen has an eat-in dining space that flows perfectly into the sizeable family room. The powder room is conveniently located on the first floor and a coat closet is located near the two-car garage.Upstairs, the owner’s suite boasts an ample bedroom, a generous walk-in closet and an oversized owner’s bathroom with a linen closet. The three additional large bedrooms and expansive open loft upstairs allow for everyone to have their own retreat. The second floor also features the laundry room, a roomy secondary bathroom with double vanity and a large hall linen closet.The included white window treatments and an innovative America’s smart home® package will give you complete peace of mind. This home will also feature a fully sodded, irrigated low-maintenance lawn.Pictures, artist renderings, photographs, colors, features, and sizes are for illustration purposes only and will vary from the homes as built. Image representative of plan only and may vary as built. Images are of model home and include custom design features that may not be available in other homes. Furnishings and decorative items not included with home purchase. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / D.R. Horton Realty Of Delaware, LLC 

 $449,900 (USD)

## Milford Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 5613 Camberly Drive Milford, DE 19963

3 Bed 

2 Baths 

2428 sqft

 **Best Days to Visit for Owner: Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Weekends**Come take a look at your next home. Nestled in the prestigious Fork Landing community set on Deep Branch Creek, this exquisite ranch-style residence offers a harmonious blend of luxury and comfort. The gourmet kitchen features a spacious island, ideal for culinary creations, while the family room, complete with a charming fireplace, serves as the heart of the home, inviting warmth and relaxation. With three well-appointed bedrooms, including a master suite with a walk-in closet, this home is designed for both privacy and convenience. Enjoy the ease of main-floor laundry and the peace of mind provided by a 24-hour in-home security system. The partially finished basement presents endless possibilities, whether you envision a home gym, media room, or additional storage. Step outside to discover a beautifully landscaped corner lot, complete with underground lawn sprinklers, ensuring your outdoor space remains lush and inviting. The expansive patio is perfect for summer dining and entertaining or simply soaking in the serene surroundings. Additional highlights include an attached, fully-insulated, oversized 3-car garage with 220V electric service, ample storage space, heated and air-conditioned, and a sizable driveway, enhancing both functionality and curb appeal. The community offers well-maintained common grounds and pier/dock maintenance, fostering a sense of belonging and tranquility. Experience the exclusive lifestyle that this remarkable property offers, where luxury meets comfort in every detail. Just 35 Minutes from the beach!!Don't miss the opportunity to make this exceptional property your own. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Coldwell Banker Realty / Ayana Morton 

 $395,000 (USD)

## Millsboro Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 431 Tunbridge Court Millsboro, DE 19966

4 Bed 

3 Baths 

0 sqft

 Beautiful 2 story new construction on a cul-de-sac lot backing up to woods. The Commons at Radish Farms is a quiet, well-maintained community central to Salisbury, Dover, and just a short distance from Delaware and Maryland beaches.The base price offers 2525 SF of living space with a 2-car garage. The builder offers many additional upgrades. The addition costs are to be negotiated with the builder.Now is a great time to discuss options for colors and finishes of your choosing. The expected completion time for your new custom home is mid-summer depending on covid and supply issues and chosen options. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Iron Valley Real Estate At The Beach 

 $375,000 (USD)

## New Castle Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 219 Kings Way New Castle, DE 19720

3 Bed 

2 Baths 

1850 sqft

 Welcome to this beautiful fully renovated Ranch nestled on nearly half an acre w/in the city limits of Historic Old New Castle! This 3Br/2Ba residence offers single floor living & a rare combination of updated living space, outdoor tranquility & walkable access to one of Delaware’s most charming & historic communities. From the moment you arrive, the property invites you in w/ its manicured landscaping, expanded driveway & welcoming curb appeal! The previous carport is now a fully enclosed one-car garage providing convenience of inside access & addl storage, while the expansive .46-acre lot offers room to grow, play & entertain! Renovations by current owners since 2019 include: Dimensional Roof (1 layer); Replaced PolyB Plumbing w/ Pex; new Hot Water Htr; new HVAC; new exterior Doors; new Sump Pump w/ water backup; new Garage Door; new interior doors, new lighting & more! Step inside to a warm, open floor plan filled w/ natural light. Gleaming LVP floors, fresh neutral paint & stylish finishes flow throughout the main level. The spacious living room is anchored by a cozy fireplace w/ new custom tile facade & wood mantel —ideal for quiet evenings or gatherings. Just off the living room, the open floor plan leads to a dining area connecting seamlessly to the fully renovated kitchen, featuring 42 oak cabinets, granite counters, SS & black appliances, tile backsplash, and tile floors w/ a convenient new door leading out to the spacious deck! Whether you're prepping a casual meal or entertaining for the holidays, this layout offers both function & flow. 3 BRs offer flexibility and comfort for day to day living. The Primary Owner-Suite includes its own private bath fully renovated to include LVP fls, vanity sink, fresh paint & all new fixtures. Whether using as BRs, home office, guest space, nursery, or playroom, each of the 2 addl BRs feature fresh paint, new flooring, ample closet space & plenty of great natural light! The newly finished Bsmt is a true highlight of this home adding over 600 sq ft of living space w/ fresh paint, wrought iron spindle railing, recessed lights, plush carpet & black-painted industrial themed open ceiling for a modern loft-like aesthetic. This lower level is ideal for a Media Rm, Home Gym, Playroom, or Family Rm. Step out back & discover the kind of backyard that’s hard to find—sprawling, flat & fully fenced! A newer storage shed adds utility, while the size of the yard provides countless opportunities for outdoor activities, recreation, or even future additions. It’s an ideal space for hosting barbecues, letting pets roam, or simply enjoying a quiet morning w/ coffee in hand. This location is truly special. Set within the city limits of Old New Castle, you’re just minutes away from the waterfront at Battery Park, scenic Riverwalk, & the colonial-era cobblestone streets lined w/ museums, shops, & local restaurants. Residents enjoy a calendar full of beloved events including: Separation Day: Delaware’s signature festival w/ a parade, vendors, & fireworks.; A Day in Old New Castle: A walking tour of private historic homes & gardens; Christmas in Old New Castle: A magical seasonal event w/ candlelight tours, music, & holiday cheer; The Flower Market & Art on the Green; Weekly community-driven events w/ local goods, produce, and crafts; Battery Park Events like live music w/ food truck evenings or Yoga by the river! Whether you're a history buff, outdoor enthusiast, or simply value community, Old New Castle offers a truly unique lifestyle! It’s not just a place to live—it’s a place to belong. Also conveniently located to major routes 9,I-95/495 & Rt 13 for easy commuting in all directions! Just 25 mins to Philadelphia! Don’t miss the chance to own a move-in ready home with generous indoor and outdoor living space in one of Delaware’s most treasured neighborhoods. See it! Love it! Buy it!...Before someone beats you to it! 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / eXp Realty, LLC 

 $365,000 (USD)

## Bear Area Townhome

 Sold 

### 206 Derrickson Street Bear, DE 19701

2 Bed 

3 Baths 

1775 sqft

 IMPORTANT: There is a 20% community age restriction requirement that has not been met. This means that your buyer does not need to be 55+. If your client is under 55 AND their children are over 18, this could be their next home!! Temporary stays for those under 18 are allowed up to 30 days per year. This flexibility could be ideal for your clients looking for a welcoming community.HOA Website: https://www.villageofjestercrossing.com/Clients can be under 55 but any children must be over 18yrs old.Welcome to serene living in this charming home nestled within the peaceful confines of a vibrant 55+ community. This delightful residence offers a host of special features designed with comfort and elegance in mind.Upon entering, you are greeted by a spacious first-floor master bedroom featuring a walk-in closet and a luxurious four-piece bath complete with a large soaking tub. The kitchen is a chef's dream, boasting 42 cabinets, gleaming hardwood floors, pantry, and a sunny breakfast area perfect for enjoying morning coffee.Upstairs, discover another bedroom with a private sitting area, a versatile loft space, and a third full bath, offering ample room for guests or hobbies. The home showcases quality craftsmanship throughout, including nine-foot ceilings on the first level, meticulously finished windows with trim, upgraded wainscoting, and custom crown moldings that add a touch of sophistication.The family room is a cozy retreat with a corner gas fireplace creating an inviting atmosphere for relaxation. Step outside to the paver patio and enjoy the serene backdrop of wooded views, making this home's lot exceptionally private compared to others in the area.This is more than just a home; it's a lifestyle choice in a community that values tranquility and convenience. Don't miss your chance to experience all that this exceptional property has to offer.PS. There is an opportunity here if you are under 55+ and your children are over 18, YOU COULD LIVE HERE!! Come check it out today! 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Coldwell Banker Realty / Ayana Morton 

 $354,500 (USD)

## Dover Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 1125 E Division Street Dover, DE 19901

4 Bed 

3 Baths 

2071 sqft

 Welcome Home to 1125 E Division St – Where Comfort Meets Opportunity!Photos coming soon.Nestled on a spacious corner lot in the heart of Dover, this beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home offers the perfect blend of modern convenience and classic charm. Step inside to discover a bright, welcoming interior with updated flooring and fresh paint throughout. The spacious eat-in kitchen is a true highlight, featuring hardwood floors, new paint, and an abundance of natural light courtesy of two elegant bay windows.One of the bedrooms has been thoughtfully transformed into a stylish butler’s pantry/walk-in pantry—ideal for preparing food or extra storage. The finished basement provides additional living space, perfect for a home office, gym, or media room.Enjoy outdoor living at its finest in the beautifully maintained backyard, complete with a covered cement porch—perfect for morning coffee or evening gatherings.Car enthusiasts, hobbyists, or investors will love the incredible garage space. A two-bay garage offers room for oversized vehicles like buses or boats and even has rental income potential. Tenant is prohibited from flushing cat litter, cleaning products, feminine hygiene products, diapers, cleaning wipes, tissue papers, paper towels and other foreign objects down the toilet. 15)Tenant pays all utilities not provided by HOA. 16)Association of Walker Farm Estate regulations apply.

Tenant pays all other utilities, including sewer. // SHOWING OPTIONS: Due to required paperwork and the high volume of inquiries, the landlord’s agent cannot provide private showings. You must either (1) schedule a showing through your own agent or (2) attend a public open house [Dates will be posted online]. // IMPORTANT INFO: (1) [Application Instructions]: Ask your agent to share them. (2) [Income Requirement]: Household gross monthly income must be at least 2.5x the rent. (3) [Credit Requirement]: Each adult applicant must have a TransUnion Resident Score of at least 660 (Note: this is not a FICO score—it’s a rental-specific score pulled via TurboTenant using a soft credit pull, so it won’t affect your credit; scores may differ from Credit Karma or other sites). (4) [Exceptions]: Any possible exceptions to the income or credit standards will be listed in the application. (5) [Vouchers]: Section 8 or other housing vouchers are not accepted. (6) [For Rent Only]: This home is not for sale and rent-to-own is not an option. (7) [Pets]: Considered on a case-by-case basis at landlord’s sole discretion; if approved, monthly pet rent applies per pet. (8) [Service/Support Animals]: Not considered pets—must provide current, verifiable documentation. (9) [Lease Term]: Leases over 12 months may be allowed (no guaranteed discount); leases under 12 months will have higher rent. (10) [Accuracy]: All information is believed to be accurate, but tenants must verify all details independently. 

 Listing Courtesy of BRIGHT IDX / Keller Williams Realty Wilmington 

 $2,500 (USD)

## Wilmington Area Rental Home

 Rented 

### 17 N Rodney Drive Wilmington, DE 19809

3 Bed 

1 Baths 

1200 sqft

 Move in and enjoy the comforts of a fully renovated 3 BR, 1 BA Row home! Brand new modern kitchen featuring new cabinetry, new countertops, tiled backsplash, stainless steel appliance and a washer & dryer. Forget about the funk of used carpeting, this home has new hardwood floors throughout. The house is painted a fresh modern color. The new bathroom features sleek tile and tile flooring. Each bedroom has ample closet space and plenty of outlets for all your hi-tech toys. The backyard is perfect for a BBQ and table with a new privacy fence and concrete patio. And the renovations don't stop there! New water heater, new driveway coming soon, and high efficiency ventilation system. All the ductwork in the house has been professionally cleaned so you can breathe easy! No dust and dirt to aggravate your allergies! Edgemoor Gardens is well-positioned just north of Downtown Wilmington in Delaware nestled along the scenic Delaware River by Fox Point State Park. This growing community in Northern Wilmington is very convenient to all public transportation, including DART and Septa Lines making travel to Wilmington and Philadelphia a breeze. The nearby Brandywine School District schools are also just a few minutes away, and shopping centers are just a short drive. Add this listing to your tour today! Non-Smokers preferred!
